incoming.heading: Ngā waeatanga SIP e taumai ana
incoming.lead: He wāhitau SIP ahurei mō te tuku waea o waho mai i tō kaiwhakarato ki te pūnaha VibeVox.
incoming.emptyTitle: Kāore anō kia waihangatia te wāhitau SIP taumai
incoming.emptyHint: Waihangahia he URI SIP ahurei me te takiuru/kupuhipa kia taea ai e ngā kiritaki te waea atu ki a koe mai i tētahi waea, ā, ka whakamāori aunoa a VibeVox i tō reo i te wā tonu.
incoming.create: Waihangahia he wāhitau SIP mō ngā waea taumai
incoming.active: Kei te tae mai ngā waea taumai.
incoming.paused: Kua waihangatia te wāhitau SIP, kua whakamutua te whiwhinga
incoming.activeHint: Ka whakarongo te kaiwhakamāori o te Piriti ki te rūma. Ka whakamāoritia ia waeatanga i te wā tonu.
incoming.pausedHint: Whakahohehia te whiwhinga waea kia tīmata ai a VibeVox ki te tuku waea taumai.
incoming.createdToast: Kua waihangatia te wāhitau SIP taumai
incoming.deletedToast: Kua tangohia te wāhitau SIP taumai
incoming.createFailed: I rahua te waihanga i te wāhitau SIP
incoming.toggleFailed: I rahua te whakawhiti i te whiwhinga

outbound.heading: Waea atu
outbound.lead: Waea atu ki tētahi nama waea mai i te atanga tukutuku, ā, ka whakamāori aunoa a VibeVox i tāu kōrero i te wā tūturu.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Tuatahi, whakatūria he pūtu SIP putaatu
outbound.noTrunkHint: Whakakīia te puka "Pūtu SIP Hou" kei te tihi o te whārangi - ka whakamahia e VibeVox tō kaiwhakarato SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, me ētahi atu) mō ngā waeatanga atu.
outbound.configureFirst: Tuatahi, whakatūria he pūtu SIP puta atu (puka kei runga ake nei)
outbound.invalidNumber: Tāuruhia te tau tika i te hōputu o te ao (+XXXXXXXXXXX)
outbound.calling: Kei te karanga mātou ki a {{number}}…

howTo.heading: Me pēhea te whakarite
howTo.step1: Tikina ngā tohu tuakiri SIP mai i tō kaiwhakarato (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Tāuruhia ki te puka i runga ake nei, kātahi ka tiakina.
howTo.step3: Ka waihanga aunoa a VibeVox i tētahi pūtu SIP putaatu i roto i te LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Kei te haere mai: URI SIP e haere mai ana mō te tuku waea o waho.

toasts.deleteFailed: Kāore i taea te muku i te pūtu

tenantOnly.hint2: Takiuru mai hei kaiwhakamahi noa kei a ia tana ake tenantId hei waihanga i tētahi pūtu.

sip.connected: Kua tiakina te pūtu SIP, ā, kua tukutahitia ki a LiveKit

sections.providerData: Ngā taipitopito mō tō kaiwhakarato SIP

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Ka mukua te whirihoranga. Ka mutu ngā waeatanga puta atu kia hangaia anōtia rā anō e koe te pūtu.

danger.deleteInboundHint: Ka tangohia te ture taumai me te ture tuku a LiveKit. Kāore e whiwhihia ngā waea taumai.
danger.reissueHint: Tukuna anō te takiuru me te kupuhipa mō te wāhitau SIP. Kāore e mahi ngā mōhiohio tawhito.

outbound2.rateInfo: Ko te utu mō ia meneti o tētahi waea atu ka whakatauhia e tō kaiwhakarato SIP.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Kāore e taea te whakakore i tēnei mahi. Kia mukua, ka mutu ngā waeatanga puta atu kia hangaia rā anō he pūtu hou.

confirm.deleteInboundBody: Kāore e taea te whakakore i tēnei mahi. Ka mukua te pūtu taumai me te ture tuku i roto i te LiveKit Cloud.

page.title: Ngā Tautuhinga Enterprise
page.subtitle: Ngā whakaurunga katoa, ngā kī, me ngā tawhā AI mō tō pūkete
page.upsellTitle: Kei te wātea tēnei wāhanga i runga i te mahere Enterprise.
page.upsellBody: I konei ka taea e koe te whirihora: he kī API Gemini whaiaro, he tohu me te pūtake mātauranga, te whakaurunga ki te karetao Quest Flow + Telegram, me te hono atu ki Chatwoot CRM.

common.savedPlaceholder: Kua tiakina (tāuruhia he mea hou hei whakakapi)

apiKey.savedPlaceholder: Kua tiakina (tāuruhia he mea hou hei whakakapi)

gemini.heading: Kī API Google Gemini
gemini.lead: He kī whaiaro mai i AI Studio. Ka whakakapia e tēnei te kī ā-ao mō ngā waeatanga Gemini katoa i runga i tō pūkete.
gemini.leadSuffix: . Whakamahia hei utu mō te waeatanga ā-ao mō ngā waeatanga Gemini katoa i runga i tō pūkete.
gemini.successSavedValidated: Kua tiakina te kī, ā, kua manatokohia – kei te mahi.
gemini.successSavedWithIssue: Kua tiakina, engari kei te whakamanahia: {{error}}
gemini.successValid: He tika te kī - kei te wātea te Gemini API.
gemini.successInvalid: Kāore te kī i te tika: {{error}}
gemini.successDeleted: Kua tangohia te kī mō ia kairēti.
gemini.confirmDeleteTitle: Mukua te kī Gemini mō ia kairēti?
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Ka whakamahia e ngā mahi AI te kī tiritahi a VibeVox (mēnā kua whirihorahia).

telegram.heading: Karetao Telegram mō ngā whakamōhiotanga
telegram.lead: Waihangahia he karetao me @BotFather ka whakauru i tana tohu. Ko te hunga e tuku karere ana ki tēnei karetao me te /start ka whiwhi whakamōhiotanga: kiritaki hou, tohu, hapa whakauru. Ka taea e koe te ohauru i ngā kaimahi maha, te tāpiri rānei i te karetao ki tētahi rōpū, ki tētahi hongere rānei—ka tukuna aunoatia ngā whakamōhiotanga ki te katoa.
telegram.leadAllWhoStart: Te hunga katoa e tuhituhi ana ki tēnei karetao
telegram.leadAfterStart: , ka whiwhi whakamōhiotanga mō ngā kiritaki hou, ngā tohu, me ngā hapa whakauru. Ka taea e koe te ohauru i ngā kaimahi maha, te tāpiri rānei i te karetao ki tētahi rōpū, ki tētahi hongere rānei—ka whiwhi aunoa te katoa i te whakamōhiotanga.
telegram.botUnlink: Wetewete i te hononga o te karetao
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Kua tiakina te karetao @{{username}}. Kua tukuna ngā mihi ki ngā kaiohauru {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Kua tiakina te karetao @{{username}}. Ka whiwhi whakamōhiotanga te hunga katoa e tuku karere ana /start.
telegram.successTestSingle: ✓ Kua tukuna te karere. Tirohia te Telegram.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Kua tukuna te karere ki ngā kaiwhiwhi {{count}}. Tirohia koa te Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Tukuna he whakamōhiotanga whakamātautau mā te karetao
telegram.confirmUnlinkTitle: Wetehia te hononga o te karetao?
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: Ka tangohia atu hoki ngā kaiohauru - ka mutu te tae mai o ngā whakamōhiotanga.
telegram.lastBroadcast: Tukunga mēra hou: i tukuna {{sent}} mai i {{total}}

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Tiakina, ā, manatokohia te kī API i te tuatahi — me pēnei te hanga whakaahua.
imageModel.hint: Mā Nano Banana te whakaputa, te whakatika me te tito. Ka whakaputa noa a Imagen mai i te kore.

prompt.heading: Ngā Tohutohu
prompt.subtitle: Tohutohu me te pūtake mātauranga mō te tuhi i ngā rūma ataata anake
prompt.warning: Kaua e whakapoauau ki te Quest Flow
prompt.showDefault: He aha te mea e whakamahia ana e te AI i te taunoa?
prompt.appendNote: Ka taea e koe te tāpiri i ō ake ture - ka whakakotahihia ēnei me ngā ture taunoa.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: mō te wetemuna karere anake i roto i ngā rūma ataata
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - ina pāwhiri koe i tētahi karere i roto i tētahi kōrerorero, ā, ka tīpako i tētahi oro
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Ka whakamahia ina pāwhiri koe i tētahi karere i roto i tētahi kōrerorero rūma ataata, ā, ka tīpako i tētahi oro
prompt.contextLeadPart2: Kei roto hoki te pūtake mātauranga (kei raro).
prompt.defaultSummary: Ngā mea e whakamahia ana e te AI i te taunoa (mēnā he kau tō āpure) - pāwhiritia hei tiro
prompt.extendNoteText: me ā rātou ake ture/kāhua/kupu - ka whakakotahitia ēnei ki te tohu taunoa i runga ake nei me te pūtake mātauranga.
prompt.errLoadSettings: I rahua te uta i ngā tautuhinga
prompt.kbHeading: Pūtake Mātauranga — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Tukuna ake he tuhinga—he rarangi tuhinga, he FAQ, he rārangi utu, he ture, he rauemi tohutohu rānei. Ka tātarihia ngā ihirangi i runga i te tūmau (Word/Excel/CSV → tuhinga) ā, ka whakauruhia e te AI ina tuhi karere ana i roto i ngā rūma ataata. Te rahinga: 50 MB kōnae / 500,000 ngā pūāhua i roto i te pātengi raraunga.
prompt.successFileUploaded: Kua utaina te kōnae "{{filename}}" ({{format}}) - kua tiakina ngā pūāhua {{kbLength}}.
prompt.successFileTruncated: Kua tapahia te ihirangi ki ngā pūāhua {{max}}.
prompt.errLoadFile: I rahua te tukuake i te kōnae
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Ka ngaro ngā tuhinga katoa kua tukuna ake. Kāore e taea te whakakore i tēnei mahi.
prompt.presetsHeading: Ngā reo whakamārama e wātea ana
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: I roto i te kōrerorero Rūma Enterprise, ka taea e koe te tohu i tētahi karere me te tono ki te AI kia whakamārama i roto i te reo kua whiriwhiria. Pātene
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: ka whakamahi i tō tohu mai i te āpure i runga ake nei.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Ngā urupare AI ki ngā kiritaki mā roto i ngā karetao Telegram me te API Inbound
questFlow.warning: Mena he takoto kau te āpure, ka whakamahia te tohuāki whānui a VibeVox.
questFlow.headerLead: Kōrero AI me ia kiritaki takitahi mā te karetao Telegram e hono ana ki Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: He mea ngaro ia kī ka whakaurua e koe ki roto i te poraka HTTP Quest Flow o tētahi mekameka. Ka whakamahia e VibeVox hei tautuhi i tō pūkete. Ka taea e koe te hanga i ngā kī maha mō ngā mekameka rerekē.
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ Tiakina te kī - kotahi noa te whakaaturanga
questFlow.savedKeyConfirm: I tiakina e au te kī
questFlow.noKeysHint: Kāore anō kia whiwhi kī. Waihangahia te tuatahi.
questFlow.confirmRevokeBody: Ka mutu te mahi a Quest Flow i roto.
questFlow.promptLead1: Ka whakatau i te MEA e kōrero ai te AI ki ngā kiritaki mā te Quest Flow: te reo, te momo, me ngā mea hei tautuhi.
questFlow.promptLeadBold1: Mena he takoto kau te āpure
questFlow.promptLead2: — ka whakamahia te tohu VibeVox whānui (kei raro).
questFlow.promptLeadBold2: Ki te whakakī koe i tō
questFlow.promptLead3: - ka honoa ki te tohutohu taketake me te pūtake mātauranga.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Ngā mea e whakamahia ana e te AI i te taunoa (mēnā he kau tō āpure) - pāwhiritia hei tiro
questFlow.successPromptSaved: Kua tiakina te tohu Quest Flow.
questFlow.kbLead1: Ngā Tuhinga – te rarangi ratonga, te rārangi utu, ngā FAQ. Tukuatu TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — kāore te AI e pupuri i ngā kōrero mō te kamupene; ka whakautu noa i runga i te mōhiotanga whānui. Ko tēnei turanga
questFlow.kbLead3: Mai i te wāhanga "Ngā Tohutohu"—mō te tuhi ataata. Te rahinga: 50 MB kōnae / 500,000 ngā pūāhua i roto i te pātengi raraunga.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Ka whakakorea te pūtake mātauranga o Quest Flow. Kāore e taea te whakakore i tēnei mahi.
questFlow.tagsLead: Ka tohaina e te AI ēnei tohu ki ngā kiritaki mēnā ka kitea he ōritenga i roto i te kōrero. Ka whakaaturia ngā tohu ki te kāri rūma o te kiritaki, ā, ka tukuna ki te CRM (Wāhanga 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Ka mukua pūmau te kī. Ka mutu te mahi a Quest Flow mā reira — me waihanga he kī hou, ka whakakapi i roto i te mekameka.

chatwoot.heading: Whakaurunga CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Tukuna aunoatia ngā hītori waea me ngā tohu ki Chatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Ka whakawhiti i te hītori kōrero me ngā tohu hiahia kiritaki ki Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Tohu Urunga Kaihoko (mai i te Kōtaha → Tohu Urunga)
chatwoot.testSuccess: Kei te mahi te hononga - kei te whakautu a Chatwoot.
chatwoot.successSaved: Kua tiakina. Pāwhiritia inaianei "Whakamātautau Hononga" hei tirotiro.
chatwoot.errLoad: I rahua te uta i ngā tautuhinga
chatwoot.whatSentHeading: He aha te mea e tukuna ana i Chatwoot
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Whakapā atu ki te kiritaki (mā te telegram_user_id, me ngā custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Kōrerorero me tētahi tuhipoka tūmataiti = hītori kōrerorero katoa
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Ngā tohu katoa kua tohua mō ngā matea i roto i
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Ka tukuna ina pāwhiritia ā-ringa e koe te "Tukuna ki CRM" i roto i te kōrerorero rūma. Ko te āhuatanga e whai ake nei ko te tuku aunoa ina kitea te tohu.
chatwoot.docsLabel: Ngā tuhinga mō te API Chatwoot

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.openWithClient: Whakatuwheratia he kōrerorero ki te kiritaki
chat.composerPlaceholder: Tuhia he karere ki te kiritaki…
chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Kāore e taea te whakakore i tēnei mahi. Ka mukua te tuhinga me ngā pāpāho e tāpirihia ana.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: Ka mukua hoki te kōnae tūturu mai i te tūmau.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: He āhuatanga Enterprise ngā rūma kōrerorero. Whakapai ake i tō mahere i te wāhanga "Utu".
chat.deleteFailed: Kāore i taea te muku i te karere
chat.empty: Kāore anō kia puta he karere i tēnei kōrerorero.
chat.explainTone: Whakamāramahia i roto i te reo kua tīpakohia

insights.title: Tātari kōrero
insights.tooShort: He poto rawa te kōrero, kāore e taea te tātari.
insights.thinking: Ka tātarihia e te AI te kōrero...
insights.nextSteps: Ngā taahiraa e whai ake nei

lobby.title: Te whakauru atu ki tētahi hui ataata
lobby.subtitle: Waea ataata me te whakamaoritanga AI i te wā kotahi
lobby.languageHint: Ka rongo koe, ka kite hoki i ngā hauraro a tō hoa kōrero i roto i taua reo.
lobby.shareHint: Tāruatia ka tukuna ki tō hoa kōrero hei tono i a rātou ki tētahi hui.
lobby.tosAgree: Mā te whakauru atu ka whakaae koe ki
lobby.audioConsent: , ā, e whakaae ana hoki ki te tukatuka i te oro mō te whakamāoritanga.

paywall.titleNoSub: Hei waihanga i tētahi rūma, me rēhita koe mō tētahi mahere
paywall.titleLowBalance: Kāore he meneti e toe ana i runga i tō toenga - rēhita mō tētahi mahere, hoko atu rānei
paywall.subtitle: Kōwhiria he mahere, hoko mai rānei i ētahi atu meneti – utu mā Stripe, whakahokia tonutia te moni i konei.
paywall.featureHd: Ngā reo HD, ataata, AI Coach
paywall.topupNote: Ka tāpirihia ngā meneti ki tō toenga moni i muri tonu i te utu.
paywall.topupCalcLoading: Ka tatau mātou i te utu…
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Kāore he ohaurunga hohe āu. Ka tāpirihia atu ki tō hoko mō te Plus €19/marama—60 meneti kei roto i tō mahere, nō reira kāore he utu tāpiri.
paywall.topupFreeLine: ↳ {{count}} min kore utu me te mahere
paywall.stripeNote: Kei raro i te mana o Stripe ngā utu. Ka tāpirihia aunoatia ngā meneti i muri i te utunga.
paywall.previewFailed: Kāore e taea te tatau i te utu
paywall.checkoutFailed: Kāore e taea te whakatuwhera i te Stripe Checkout

billingPage.title: Ngā utu me ngā utu
billingPage.subtitle: Ngā āhuatanga katoa o VibeVox — whiriwhiria he mahere e tika ana mō tō tere mahi.
billingPage.untilEndOfPeriod: tae noa ki te mutunga o te wā utu
billingPage.cancelAutoRenewQuestion: Whakakorehia te whakahoutanga aunoa o tō ohaurunga?
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Whakakorehia te whakahou aunoa. Ka noho tonu tō ohaurunga tae noa ki te mutunga o te wā o nāianei.
billingPage.canceled: Kua tohua te ohaurunga mō te whakakorenga
billingPage.cancelFailed: Kāore e taea te whakakore i te ohaurunga
billingPage.resumeAutoRenewQuestion: Me tīmata anō te whakahoutanga aunoa o te ohaurunga?
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Ka utua te utu e whai ake nei i te mutunga o te wā o nāianei.
billingPage.resumeTooltip: Tīmata anō i te whakahoutanga aunoa o te ohaurunga.
billingPage.resumeFailed: Kāore i taea te whakahou i tō ohaurunga
billingPage.promoHint: Ka whakamahia aunoa te hekenga ina rēhita koe mō tētahi mahere, ina hoko rānei i ētahi atu meneti.
billingPage.promoInvalid: Kāore i te tika te waehere whakatairanga
billingPage.checkoutNoUrl: Kāore i tae mai te URL Stripe Checkout
billingPage.checkoutFailed: Kāore i taea te whakatuwhera i te utu: {{error}}
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Ngā meneti i kawea mai i te wā o mua. Ka pau tuatahi.
billingPage.topupHelp: He paewhiri hoko tāpiri. E wātea ana me te ohaurunga hohe.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Mō ngā whiriwhiringa tūmataiti me ngā kaimahi motuhake
billingPage.tierStandardSummary: Mō ngā tīma me ngā kaiwhiriwhiri hohe
billingPage.tierEnterpriseSummary: Puranga AI katoa mō te pakihi
billingPage.featureCountWithMinutes: {{count}} meneti o te whakamāoritanga ia marama
billingPage.featureHd: Ngā reo whakamāori HD (Aoede, Charon, Kore)
billingPage.featureSip: Waea SIP (waea taumai me te waea puta atu)
billingPage.featureLearnHub: AI Learning Hub — ōna ake reo
billingPage.featureRollover: Te kawe i ngā meneti ki te marama e whai ake nei
billingPage.featureCRM: Ngā kāri kiritaki me te tohu aunoa
billingPage.featureTelegramAuth: Whakamanatanga Telegram + hono atu ki tētahi kāri
billingPage.featureSmartTags: Te tohu atamai i ngā matea
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Kia ora! Kei te hiahia ahau ki te mahere Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.searchLanguagesPlaceholder: Kimihia tō reo - hei tauira, "Portuguese", "português", ru
billingPage.faqQ1: Ka pēhea ngā meneti kāore i whakamahia?
billingPage.faqA1: Ka mau tonu ngā meneti kāore i whakamahia ki te marama e whai ake nei. Ka pau i te marama tuatoru.
billingPage.faqQ2: Ka taea e au te whakakore i taku ohaurunga i ngā wā katoa?
billingPage.faqA2: Āe. Ka taea e koe te whakakore i roto i tō pūkete whaiaro mā te pāwhiri kotahi. Ka haere tonu te wā kua utua tae noa ki tōna mutunga.
billingPage.faqQ3: He aha ngā mea kei roto i te Enterprise?
billingPage.faqA3: Puranga AI katoa: kāri kiritaki me te mōhio-aunoa, whakamanatanga Telegram, tohutoro whaiaro, Maramataka Google, tohu hiahia atamai, kaweake CRM, whakaurunga ki questflow.pro, me tētahi ripa kaiwhakahaere motuhake.
billingPage.faqQ4: Ko tēhea kaiwhakarato waea SIP e hiahiatia ana e koe?
billingPage.faqA4: Tetahi mea e tutuki ana i te RFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, me ētahi atu. Ka waihanga aunoa a VibeVox i tētahi pūtu putanga.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 ia meneti. Mai i te 60 meneti ki te 10 hāora. Ka whiwhi nama tonu i muri i te utu.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: me te hekenga o -{{percent}}% me te waehere whakatairanga {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailNoRefund: Kāore te moni e whakahokia mai.
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: Ka noho tonu te ohaurunga tae noa ki te {{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Kei te wātea ngā meneti utu tae noa ki tēnei rā; ka taea te hoko meneti tāpiri.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: Ā muri iho, ka kati aunoa te ohaurunga.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Kua whakakorea te whakahoutanga aunoa · ka kati te ohaurunga {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: E whai mana ana ngā meneti o tō mahere tae noa ki tēnei rā; ka taea e koe te hoko atu i ētahi atu. Pāwhiritia "Haere Anō" mēnā ka huri tō whakaaro.
billingPage.yearlySavings: Penapena €59 ia tau (2 marama kore utu)
billingPage.languagesLead: He rārangi katoa o ngā reo e tautokona ana e te whakamāoritanga wā-tūturu. Te kimi aunoa i te reo pūtake—ka tīpakohia e ia kaiuru tōna ake reo taketake.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: Kāore i kitea te reo i te rārangi o ngā mea e tautokona ana.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Whakamātauria tētahi atu tuhi - hei tauira, i te reo Pākehā, i te arapū rānei o te rohe. Mēnā kei te ngaro te reo, whakamōhio mai ki a mātou, ā, mā mātou e tāpiri.

seo.title: VibeVox — Whakamāoritanga AI wā-tūturu mō ngā waea ataata me te SIP
seo.description: He tūāpapa whakamāori reo ā-AI a VibeVox e tautoko ana i te 100+ reo. Kei te wātea ngā waea ataata, te waea SIP, te kōrerorero kiritaki, me te tātari kōrerorero ā-AI.
seo.keywords: Whakamāoritanga AI, whakamāoritanga tukutahi, waea ataata me te whakamāoritanga, waea SIP, kaiwhakamāori reo

footer.poweredBy: Whakamāoritanga e whakamahia ana e te AI

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: He kaiwhakamāori AI tukutahi a VibeVox mō ngā waeatanga reo me ngā waeatanga ataata i roto i ngā reo 108. Ka mahi tahi te WebRTC me te waea SIP, te kaiawhina reo, me te whakamāoritanga wā-tūturu i runga i tētahi pūrere.
pwaInstall.installCta: Tāpirihia a VibeVox ki tō mata kāinga—ngā waea me te whakamāoritanga, te SIP, me te kaiawhina AI i roto i te pāwhiri kotahi. Ka mahi pērā i te taupānga taketake.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Haere ki te mata kāinga - whakarewahia mā te pāwhiri kotahi

partner.loadError: I rahua te uta i ngā raraunga hoa
